title: Intensely Crunchy Jamaican Runner Beans Fried Rice
description: A low-carb, herbal, and crunchy solo dinner dish featuring Jamaican runner beans, served with fried rice on a comal.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat on the comal.
Add chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add chopped scotch bonnet pepper and cook for an additional minute.
Add minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds, until fragrant.
Add trimmed runner beans and cook until tender, about 4 minutes.
Add cooked rice to the skillet, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Stir in dried thyme, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 2 minutes, until the rice is heated through and starting to brown.
Use a spatula to shape the rice mixture into a flat, round shape, and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the bottom is crispy and golden brown.
Flip the rice mixture over and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the other side is also crispy and golden brown.
